name: Vidalia Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to meld.
3. Drain any excess liquid from the onions before serving.
4. Mix well with dressing and serve as an hors d'oeuvre on crackers or as a substitute for coleslaw.
5. The relish will keep well for 24 - 48 hours when stored in the refrigerator.
